ownedValue.value:
<<exists t:BLESS_Types::Time in t<=now
         that (POST_Failure or RAM_Failure or ROM_failure or CPU_Failure or Thread_Monitor_Failure)@t>>

<<light iff( exists t:BLESS_Types::Time in t<=now
         that (POST_Failure or RAM_Failure or ROM_failure or CPU_Failure or Thread_Monitor_Failure)@t)>>

<<exists k:integer --there is some entry 
         in 0 .. (iPCA_Properties::Drug_Library_Size-1)  --in the array of drug library
         that DRUG_LIBRARY[k].code=DRUG_CODE  --having the given drug code
         and the_drug_record=DRUG_LIBRARY[k]>>
